hooks.command: node /home/user/finance-tracker/run-tests.js 2>&1; rc=$?; [ $rc -eq 0 ] && echo '{"continue":true}' || echo '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"[verify we good] Tests failed — fix before pushing"}'

hooks.command: git -C /home/user/finance-tracker fetch origin main 2>&1 && git -C /home/user/finance-tracker rebase origin/main 2>&1; rb=$?; if [ $rb -ne 0 ]; then echo '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"[verify we good] Rebase failed — resolve conflicts first"}'; exit 0; fi; node /home/user/finance-tracker/run-tests.js 2>&1; rc=$?; [ $rc -eq 0 ] && echo '{"continue":true}' || echo '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"[verify we good] Tests failed after rebase — fix before merging"}'
hooks.statusMessage: [verify we good] Rebasing + running tests before merge...
